events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Richard Starkey, known professionally as Ringo Starr, turns 86 on July 7th.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young! The man who provided the heartbeat for the biggest band in the world, Ringo Starr, is celebrating today. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! From stadium-filling riffs to astrophysics, is there anything this man can't do? What's your favourite Queen song with a Brian May guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, turns 83 on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Still got the moves like Jagger at 83! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched
events.blurb: Music Television, or MTV, launched on August 1st, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV burst onto screens, forever changing how we consume music. The first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony is not lost on us. What was your favourite music video from back in the day?

events.title: Oasis release Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29th, 1994, featuring classics like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's been 32 years since Oasis dropped their debut masterpiece, 'Definitely Maybe'. An album that defined a generation and launched them into superstardom. What's your favourite track from the record?

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, '3 Days of Peace & Music', took place from August 15th to 18th, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Remembered
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the iconic Woodstock festival kicked off, bringing together half a million people for '3 Days of Peace & Music'. A true moment in music history. Which artist would you have loved to see there?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: August 16th marks the anniversary of the passing of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who died in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, on the anniversary of his passing. His music continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Tupac Shakur remembered
events.blurb: September 1st marks the tragic anniversary of the shooting of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas in 1996, who later died on September 13th.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur on music and culture, following the tragic events of 1996. His lyrics and legacy live on. What's his most iconic track for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: The world remembers the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who tragically passed away on September 18th, 1970.

angles.name: Remembering Hendrix
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, whose groundbreaking guitar work changed music forever. Gone too soon, but never forgotten. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: Beatles release Abbey Road
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26th, 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs... pure magic. What's your favourite memory associated with this legendary record?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday on September 7th.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, singer, songwriter, and the driving force behind The Pretenders. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The unmistakable voice of Oasis, Liam Gallagher, turns 54 on September 21st.

angles.name: Mad for it!
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Love him or... well, you know. What's your favourite Liam moment or song?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11th, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon released his powerful message of peace, 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates globally today. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the revolutionary first iPod on October 23rd, 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket.'

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple unveiled the original iPod, changing how we listen to music forever. '1,000 songs in your pocket' was just the beginning! Did you have one of the early models?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Happy 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 'Dr. No' first hit screens. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: On October 9th, we remember John Lennon, who would have been 86, a true icon of music and peace.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon song?
